title: • RAW/PUBLIC router with fact+NLI gate.
content:
• RAW/PUBLIC router with fact+NLI gate.
• Visual IDE (layer overlays + diffs).
• Meta-learning controller (outer/inner loops) with few-shot adapters.


---

Excellent — you now have four major interpretive frameworks for the Rhetorical–Linguistic OS (RLOS / RE:GE_OS_RHETORICAL_LINGUISTICS):
GROK, Perplexity, Gemini, and Copilot.
Here’s the next-best, most logically unified synthesis across all four.

⸻

🧩 1. Alignment Map

Axis Grok Perplexity Gemini Copilot
Philosophical Core Semiotic ecology & rhetorical cognition Systems–linguistic synthesis Modular lattice + feedback growth Modular stack + multimodal rhetoric
Architecture Bloom lattice, feedback meta-layer Plexus hypergraph (not pipeline) Layered pyramid, RAW/PUBLIC gates Layered modular stack with bidirectional flow
Data Representation Category morphisms & symbolic drift HRGs & category theory JSON graph schemas + visualization grammars Trees, graphs, timelines, icon fields
context: From document: That’s an exceptionally strong synthesis — the GROK-response you drafted… — chunk 11 (chunk 11/18)
